news.summary: In Irvine, California on April 17, 2025, CPT Group, Inc., a prominent company specializing in class action settlement administration, has appointed Trevor Jones as Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Trevor is taking on this position following his tenure in advancing CPT Group's Digital Transformation strategies.
news.headline: CPT Group, Inc. appoints Trevor Jones as Chief Technology Officer after serving in Digital Transformation.

news.summary: The recent data shows a significant increase in online shopping during the holiday season, with a 40% rise in the number of online transactions compared to last year. The total amount spent online has also increased by 35%, reaching a record high of $200 billion. Additionally, mobile shopping has seen a surge, with a 50% increase in purchases made through mobile devices. This shift towards online and mobile shopping is attributed to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic, which has encouraged more people to shop from the safety of their homes. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue even after the pandemic ends.
news.headline: Asian stocks poised for a lackluster start after Fed letdown, check market for updates.
Japanese Core CPI Nationwide YoY Actual 3.2% (Forecast 3.2%, Previous 3.0%)
Japanese CPI Overall Nationwide Actual 3.6% (Forecast 3.7%, Previous 3.7%)

news.summary: Today, the stock market saw a decline as UnitedHealth's discouraging 2025 outlook impacted investor sentiment. However, there was a notable surge in oil stocks, with few showing potential for significant growth. Despite President Trump's threat to fire Federal Reserve Chair Powell, the S&P 500 and small-cap stocks managed to rise. Additionally, crude oil experienced a notable increase of 3%.
news.headline: Stock market mixed as S&P 500, small caps rise despite Trump's threat to fire Fed Chair Powell; crude oil up 3%. UnitedHealth 2025 outlook dampened investor mood. Oil stocks rallied but few breakout-ready.

news.summary: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, based in Ladera Ranch, California, has made a strategic move by transitioning to fully unsecured status on its senior credit facility and private placement notes. This successful transition reflects the company's strong financial position and creditworthiness, as it eliminates the need for specific collateral for these financial instruments. With this transition, SmartStop Self Storage REIT showcases its stability and reliability in the market, contributing to its continued growth and success.
news.headline: SmartStop Self Storage REIT in Calif goes fully unsecured on senior credit facility and private placement notes.

news.summary: In Superior, Arizona on April 17, 2025, the United States Forest Service announced a mandatory 60-day notice regarding their plans to reissue a Final Environmental Impact Statement (FEIS) for the Resolution Copper project. This development signals the agency's intention to revisit and potentially make changes to the existing environmental assessment. The notice highlights the commitment to thorough evaluation and adherence to regulatory procedures. The Resolution Copper project holds significance for various stakeholders and the community, with the reissuance of the FEIS likely to involve a detailed examination of the project's impact. This regulatory step reflects a dedication to transparency and scrutiny in ensuring environmental considerations are appropriately addressed.
news.headline: USFS gives 60-day notice to republish Final Environmental Impact Statement for Resolution Copper Project in Superior, Arizona.

news.summary: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. ("Kodiak"), a renowned provider of contract gas compression and related services, has initiated the construction of two state-of-the-art facilities in Midland and Pecos, Texas. This significant investment demonstrates Kodiak's dedication to operational proficiency, staff growth, and enduring support for the Permian Basin. The official groundbreaking ceremonies for these facilities took place on April 14, 2025, with the participation of local Chamber of Commerce authorities and other key figures. The commitment to these projects reflects Kodiak's focus on innovation and expansion within the region.
news.headline: Kodiak Gas Services building new facilities in Midland & Pecos, TX, demonstrating commitment to Permian Basin.
Importance of SALT deduction in Trump's tax reform - essential for many taxpayers,.

news.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.20 per common share, payable on June 18, 2025. The dividend will be distributed to shareholders of record as of June 3, 2025. L3Harris Technologies is a trusted disruptor in the defense industry, focusing on delivering technology solutions for space, air, land, and sea operations while keeping customers' critical needs at the forefront.
news.headline: L3Harris Technologies declares $1.20 quarterly dividend per share, payable on June 18, 2025 to shareholders as of June 3.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the number of global COVID-19 cases has surpassed 5 million, with over 300,000 deaths reported worldwide. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 1.5 million confirmed cases and 90,000 deaths. Countries are continuing efforts to contain the spread of the virus through various measures like lockdowns and social distancing guidelines. The economic impact of the pandemic is also significant, with millions of job losses reported and businesses facing closures. Health experts emphasize the importance of following safety protocols to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Bigstack Opportunities I Inc. receives conditional approval from TSXV and files statement.

news.summary: In San Diego, Airgain, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRG), a prominent provider of advanced wireless connectivity solutions empowering innovation in 5G technology, revealed granting inducement awards to a new employee who just onboarded. The awards, issued on April 15, 2025, under Airgain’s 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, offer equity incentives to new hires to attract them to the company.
news.headline: Airgain, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRG) grants inducement awards to one new employee on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Baltimore on April 17, 2025, Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE: PEO), a long-standing closed-end fund, disclosed the election of Gregory W. Buckley as the President of the Fund.
news.headline: Gregory W. Buckley elected President of Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE: PEO), one of the oldest closed-end funds.

news.summary: According to analysts at JP Morgan, investors are currently favoring gold over Bitcoin as a safe haven investment option amidst market volatility. The report released on Thursday highlighted this trend, indicating a shift towards the traditional precious metal as investors seek stability. This choice comes as a response to the uncertainty in the market, with gold being perceived as a more reliable asset during turbulent times. The move reflects a growing preference for gold, with investors opting for its stability over the more volatile nature of Bitcoin.
news.headline: According to JP Morgan report, investors prefer gold to Bitcoin as a safe-haven amid volatility.

news.summary: Accel Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE: ACEL) disclosed the commencement of its inaugural Illinois casino, Fairmount Park Casino & Racing, on April 18, 2025. The company aims to tap into the local racino sector, highlighting convenience and market reach. Accel, known for providing comprehensive gaming services to U.S. local businesses, seeks to leverage its operational proficiency in this venture.
news.headline: Accel Entertainment opens Fairmount Park Casino & Racing in Illinois on April 18, 2025—strategic move into racino market.

news.summary: Following her split from Steve Wynn, Ms. Wynn emerged as a formidable presence in her own right, establishing herself as a prominent figure in Las Vegas. Formerly known as the king and queen of the city, the couple's divorce marked a significant change in their dynamic.
news.headline: Las Vegas mogul Elaine Wynn, 82, passes away. Formerly part of power couple with Steve Wynn, she grew into a force after divorce.

news.summary: OpenAI was in talks to buy Anysphere, producer of Cursor AI, but discussions stalled. They are now negotiating a $3 billion deal to buy WindSurf, their biggest acquisition. OpenAI expects revenue to triple in 2025 to $12.7 billion by selling AI models. CEO Sam Altman says profit may come by 2029 with $125 billion in revenue. DeepSeek R1 released in Jan 2025 is cost-effective and challenges AI assumptions. Open-source AI is gaining traction against centralized systems. Cost of AI development is decreasing with high costs and centralization issues still hindering large-scale AI developers. Dr. Ala Shaabana of OpenTensor Foundation states that DeepSeek proves open-source AI is competitive and cost-effective.
news.headline: OpenAI's $3B WindSurf deal fell through after Anysphere talks. OpenAI aims for $12.7B revenue in 2025, seeks profitability by 2029.

news.summary: James Bennet, the ex-Opinion editor of The New York Times, admitted fault for a mistake in an editorial that has stirred controversy.
news.headline: Ex-Times editor admits fault in Sarah Palin defamation case, taking responsibility for an error in the editorial.
Hokkaido Elec considers shares for 1.6 trillion yen investment plan, Nikkei

news.summary: Rising gold prices have been leading to significant outperformance recently, with the precious metal hitting all-time highs. However, experts caution against putting all investments solely into gold. Diversification is key to managing risk and maximizing returns in commodity trading. Investors looking to capitalize on surging gold prices can consider various strategies to make the most of the current market conditions.
news.headline: Gold prices are surging, traders advised not to focus solely on gold but explore commodity trades for profit.

news.summary: In Baltimore on April 17, 2025, Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) released the first-quarter investment performance figures. The Fund reported a -3.9% total return on its net asset value with dividends and capital gains reinvested. This performance outperformed both the S&P 500 Index and the Morningstar U.S. Large Blend category, which each saw a -4.3% total return during the same period. The Fund also recorded a -3.9% total return on its market price for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Adams Diversified Equity Fund reports -3.9% total return in first quarter of 2025, outperforming S&P 500 and Morningstar U.S. Large Blend.

news.summary: Bird Construction Inc., based in Mississauga, Ontario, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 14, 2025, post-market closure. The company, listed under TSX as BDT, is set to conduct a conference call alongside a live webcast on May 15, 2025, starting at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The event aims to delve into the quarterly figures and provide insights into the company's recent economic standing.
news.headline: Bird Construction Inc. will announce 2025 Q1 financial results on May 14 and hold a conference call on May 15 at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: The parent company of Truth Social, Trump Media & Technology Group, has accused UK-based Qube of potentially shorting DJT stock without proper disclosure of their positions.
news.headline: Trump Media asks SEC to probe suspicious trading of DJT stock by UK-based Qube; alleges improper disclosure of shorting.

news.summary: In Silverstone, England, on April 17, 2025, the Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team marked a spectacular comeback to Saudi Arabia ahead of the Kingdom's forthcoming Grand Prix. Aston Martin Aramco, in collaboration with title sponsor Aramco, organized multiple events designed to thrill and motivate...
news.headline: Aston Martin Aramco celebrates Saudi Arabian Grand Prix with showstopping return ahead of upcoming event.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 24, 2025, Ascot Resources Ltd. revealed its audited consolidated financial outcomes for the year concluded on December 31, 2024. The Company, identified as Ascot, trades under the symbols TSX: AOT and OTCQX: AOTVF. For comprehensive information regarding the audited consolidated financial statements, Management's Discussion and Analysis, and Annual Information Form for the fiscal year finishing on December 31, 2024, access the Company's filings on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.
news.headline: Ascot Resources Ltd. announces 2024 financial results, detailed filings on SEDAR+. TSX: AOT; OTCQX: AOTVF mentioned.

news.summary: ValOre Metals Corp. and South Atlantic Gold Inc. have announced an amalgamation agreement on March 26, 2025. ValOre will acquire all of the issued and outstanding common shares of South Atlantic, as well as other securities. The companies will amalgamate under the Business Corporations Act of British Columbia. The resulting company, "Amalco," will be a wholly-owned subsidiary of ValOre. This agreement follows a joint news release on February 17, 2025. ValOre is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange (VO), OTCQB (KVLQF), and Frankfurt Stock Exchange (KEQ0), while South Atlantic is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange (SAO).
news.headline: ValOre acquires South Atlantic Gold, creating 99,924 ha precious metals district in Brazil, completing amalgamation.

news.summary: After undergoing restructuring, Biora has transitioned into a privately owned company. The firm has secured long-term funding to expedite the advancement of its BioJet™ platform.
news.headline: Biora Therapeutics, a privately held company, completes restructuring process for development of BioJet™ platform.

news.summary: The management board of AS PRFoods (registration code 11560713, located at Pärnu mnt 141, Tallinn 11314; ISIN EE3100101031; known as PRFoods) is recommending to shareholders the adoption of resolutions without holding a meeting under § 299 1 of the Commercial Code.
news.headline: AS PRFoods is proposing adoption of resolutions without a meeting based on Commercial Code §299 1.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with over 300,000 confirmed deaths. The situation remains critical as countries continue to battle the spread of the virus and work towards finding a viable vaccine. The economic impact has also been severe, with millions facing job losses and financial instability. Governments around the globe are implementing various measures to support their citizens and economies during this challenging time. The World Health Organization continues to provide guidance and recommendations to help control the spread of the virus and minimize its impact on society. Stay informed and follow safety guidelines to protect yourself and others during this global pandemic.
news.headline: Company plans to assess strategic options for future growth opportunities.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Vincerx Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: VINC) from San Mateo, California, disclosed the termination of a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Global Digital Holdings Inc., known as QumulusAI, concerning a potential merger.
news.headline: Vincerx Pharma terminates LOI with QumulusAI for potential merger, opts for wind-down; Nasdaq: VINC.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Clear Blue Technologies International Inc. (TSXV: CBLU) (FRA: 0YA) (OTCQB: CBUTF) announced updated terms of the Financing Agreements with RE Royalties in a press release. The revised details included specific changes to the financial arrangements between the two companies.
news.headline: Clear Blue Technologies (TSXV: CBLU) completes balance sheet restructuring with updated Financing Agreements.

news.summary: The transfer of the Hawthorne Collective underscores the company's emphasis on separating its cannabis assets and fostering substantial growth in its primary lawn and garden sector. This strategic move aims to strategically position the company for future expansion and success. The transfer reflects a dedicated effort to distinctively manage the cannabis division from the core business, ultimately driving increased efficiency and profitability. The decision signifies a shift towards focusing on the lawn and garden segment, highlighting the company's commitment to enhancing its core operations.
news.headline: ScottsMiracle-Gro transfers Hawthorne Collective, focusing on separating cannabis holdings, driving growth in lawn and garden business.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Currency Exchange International, Corp. (“CXI”) announced a referral agreement with CCE, a top Canadian retailer of foreign exchange services. CCE, a subsidiary of DUCA established in 1954, operates 19 branches in Ontario. They provide various services like digital products, foreign exchange conversions, debit/deposit transactions, cheques, money transfers, and wire payments in 120+ currencies. DUCA has grown from a single Toronto branch to 19 locations in the GTA and Central Ontario, boasting 93,000+ members and over $8.3 billion in total assets, including managed assets.
news.headline: Currency Exchange International, Corp. partners with Continental Currency Exchange to offer foreign exchange services; CCE has 19 branches in Ontario and over $8.3 billion in total assets.

news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp. has recently finalized a deal to sell its stakes in Roxgold Sanu SA, along with three other Burkina Faso subsidiaries, to Soleil Resources International Limited. This transaction marks the exit of Fortuna from operations in Burkina Faso. The Yaramoko Mine, operated by Roxgold Sanu, is a key asset included in the agreement. Soleil Resources International Limited, a private company based in Mauritius, is set to acquire these interests. Post the completion of this deal, Fortuna will no longer have any business activities in Burkina Faso.
news.headline: Fortuna sells Yaramoko Mine in Burkina Faso to Soleil Resources International Limited; ceases operations in country.

news.summary: NerdWallet has revealed plans for a conference call in San Francisco to discuss their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The call intends to delve into key figures and data pertaining to the company's earnings and growth during this period, providing stakeholders with insights into NerdWallet's financial standing. This event signifies NerdWallet's proactive approach in transparency and communication with the public, indicating their commitment towards keeping investors and the market informed about their financial health.
news.headline: NerdWallet schedules call to discuss Q1 2025 financial results. From San Francisco - no further details provided.

news.summary: A gaming company has revealed plans for the second annual myVIP World Tournament of Slots scheduled to take place at Atlantis Paradise Island in the Bahamas from October 22 to 26, 2025. The event, organized by PLAYSTUDIOS, aims to bring together slot enthusiasts from around the globe for a thrilling competition. This prestigious tournament is set to attract a significant number of participants and spectators eager to showcase their skills and compete for top prizes.
news.headline: PLAYSTUDIOS hosts second myVIP World Tournament in Bahamas, offering players chance to win $1 million cash prize.

news.summary: Lundin Mining Corporation (TSX: LUN) is pre-announcing certain impacts on its quarterly earnings for the first quarter of 2025. Revenue is expected to be positively impacted by around $45 million from provisional pricing adjustments on prior period concentrate sales. There are anticipated losses from foreign exchange derivative contracts, including $12 million from Canadian dollar contracts related to the acquisition of Filo Corp. Additionally, there are foreign exchange losses of approximately $10 million due to currency fluctuations. Non-cash items in the quarter include unrealized foreign exchange losses of $9 million and a $36 million gain on foreign exchange and commodity derivative contracts. The company will release its first quarter 2025 results on May 7, 2025, and hold a webcast and conference call on May 8, 2025. Lundin Mining is a Canadian base metals mining company.
news.headline: Lundin Mining pre-announces impacts on Q1 2025 results: $45M provisional pricing adjustments, $12M forex losses, $10M fx losses, $9M unrealized fx losses, $36M unrealized gain. Q1 results to be discussed on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) announced the latest updates for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, ending on March 31, 2025, from Orovalle, Spain. The company is pleased to report on production and exploration activities during this period. Juan Gavidia will provide more detailed information on the developments.
news.headline: Orvana Minerals Corp. reports Q2 FY2025 production & exploration update from Orovalle, Spain on April 17, 2025. TSX: ORV.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange eXch is shutting down on May 1 due to allegations that it was used to launder $35 million from a $1.4 billion hack on Bybit by North Korea's Lazarus Group. Despite initially denying the claims, eXch admitted to processing a small portion of the stolen funds. Bybit suffered one of the largest hacks in crypto history, resulting in more than $5 billion in withdrawals. Bybit managed to regain its market share post-hack, paying over $2 million to bounty hunters for information to freeze funds. eXch cited concerns over being targeted by a SIGINT operation and emphasized user privacy in its decision to cease operations.
news.headline: Crypto exchange eXch to close amid $35M money laundering allegations tied to a $1.4B Bybit hack. Bybit hack resulted in over $5B in withdrawals. CEO said they could cover loss before shutting services. Bybit recovered 7% market share after paying $2M to bounty hunters.

IMF staff reach agreement on third review of Jordan

news.summary: Beamer Laser Marking Systems, a leading U.S. provider of industrial laser marking equipment, has entered a new phase after being acquired by Fonon Quantum Technologies, Inc. The company's operations have been consolidated into a modern facility in Orlando, Florida. This strategic transition is aimed at fostering rapid expansion and enhancing efficiency. The move signifies a promising future for Beamer under the ownership of FQTI.
news.headline: Beamer Laser Marking Systems experiences growth after acquisition by Fonon Quantum Technologies, Inc. in Florida facility.

news.summary: The Das Lab at Stanford University is making strides in RNA folding research by leveraging the power of NVIDIA DGX Cloud. Through a combination of community engagement and state-of-the-art technology, the lab is working to enhance the accuracy of RNA models. This collaboration highlights the commitment to innovation in the field of biology and computational science.
news.headline: Stanford Das Lab uses NVIDIA DGX Cloud to boost RNA folding research, aiming for more precise RNA models with community support.

news.summary: Learn about the regulatory guidelines and potential safe harbor requirements for airdrops in the blockchain industry, as discussed by a16z crypto. Gain insights into how these proposals could impact compliance with U.S. securities legislation. Delve deeper into this subject for a comprehensive understanding of the evolving legal landscape in the blockchain space.
news.headline: Discover legal perspectives and safe harbor proposals for airdrops in blockchain with insights from a16z crypto, impacting U.S. securities laws.

news.summary: JPMorgan analysts Jeremy Tonet and Maia G. Crook believe that utility companies are well-prepared amidst fears of a global downturn caused by recent tariff increases. JPMorgan's forecast predicts a -0.3% decline in U.S. GDP for 2025, with a 60% chance of a U.S. recession, up from 40% the previous month due to the new tariffs. The analysts highlight utilities' secure return profiles and cost structures that shield them from direct impacts on earnings per share. Additionally, potential rate reductions could enhance their appeal to investors. However, Tonet warns that prolonged tariff uncertainties could negatively impact sentiment and the overall economy, leading to affordability issues. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: JPMorgan predicts -0.3% U.S. GDP contraction in 2025; analysts see utilities as shielded from tariff impact. Probability of U.S. recession now at 60%, up from 40% last month. Regulated return profile and cost-of-service structure make utilities less susceptible. Tariff uncertainty may harm sentiment and economy.

news.summary: Bitfinex recently released version 1.113 of its trading platform, featuring improvements in user interface and bug fixes to provide a better user experience and boost operational efficiency. This update aims to enhance the platform's performance and address issues reported by users. Customers are encouraged to download the latest version to benefit from these enhancements.
news.headline: Bitfinex releases v1.113 of trading platform with UI upgrades and bug fixes, aimed at improving user experience and operational efficiency.

news.summary: UiPath, Inc. (NYSE: PATH) saw a rise in shares on Wednesday after unveiling their new UiPath Medical Record Summarization agent at Google Cloud Next 2025. This generative AI-based tool, powered by Google Cloud Vertex AI and Gemini models, is currently in private preview. It allows payer and provider organizations to utilize generative AI and automation for more precise analysis of medical records efficiently. Developed with input from clinical professionals, the agent offers a comprehensive summary of medical documents in just minutes, a significant improvement from the normal 45 minutes required for manual review.
news.headline: UiPath launches AI-driven medical record summarization tool at Google Cloud Next 2025, reducing processing time to minutes.
